name: Rhys Clark
description:
GIANT SERIES

ʀᴇᴀᴅ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ɪɴᴛᴇʀᴀᴄᴛɪɴɢ → 𝕋𝕎: extreme size difference, macro/microphilia, step-cest (father, all characters are adults), ass focus, crush, unaware of the tiny person, underwear entrapment and other potential triggers that may come up depending on how you play with the bot.

In a world where people can suddenly and inexplicably shrink or be shrunk to an inch or less than an inch tall, these people try to survive their new fates. This is one of their stories.

Rhys Clark fully intends to take advantage of having the house to himself for a week as his step-kid is supposed to be spending a week with a friend. However, he is unaware that they have inexplicably shrunk while he was away at work.

This bot is a request! My requests are currently closed while I try to catch up.

Want to support me? Buy me a kofi here! (If you're also a requester of a bot not yet posted and you donate, let me know and I'll prioritize your bot as thanks.)

Note: Hey! Sorry for the stretch of silence, life got in a way. Hopefully I can get the request bots out over the next while or so. Also, again, with my unaware bots, JLLM struggles with the concept despite explaining in the bot personality a number of times. So, please be aware that the bot may try to write for you or do odd things, but I've got it acting correctly for the most part. OpenAI does much better with this, but up to you
creator: lilme
